zh.lifeSummary: 當William Proude於1507年出生在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞時，他的父親Thomas Proude26歲，母親Proude22歲。他於1538年與Rose Serle在英國肯特沃爾坦結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1545年9月21日在他的家鄉享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特桑德維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Proude于1507年出生在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞时，他的父亲Thomas Proude26岁，母亲Proude22岁。他于1538年与Rose Serle在英国肯特沃爾坦结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1545年9月21日在他的家乡享年38岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特桑德維其。

nameMeanings.name: Proude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Proud
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): nickname for a vain or haughtyman, from Middle English prod, prud ‘proud’ (late OldEnglish prūd, from the oblique form of Old Frenchproz).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Proude was born in 1507, in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Proude, was 26 and his mother, Proude, was 22. He married Rose Serle in 1538, in Waltham, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 21 September 1545, in his hometown, at the age of 38, and was buried in Sandwich, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Proude est né en 1507, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Proude, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Proude, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Rose Serle en 1538, à Waltham, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 21 septembre 1545, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Sandwich, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Proude 1507 in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Proude 26 und seine Mutter Proude 22. Er hat 1538 in Waltham, Kent, England Rose Serle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 21. September 1545 im Alter von 38 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Sandwich, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Proude è nato il nel 1507 nel Canterbury, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Proude, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Proude, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Rose Serle nel 1538, nel Waltham, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 21 settembre 1545, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Sandwich, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Proudeが1507年にイギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Proudeは26歳，母Proudeは22歳であった。1538年にイギリスケントワルサムでRose Serleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1545年9月21日に故郷で38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントサンドウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Proude(이)가 1507년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Proude(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Proude(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1538년 영국 켄트 월섬에서 Rose Serle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1545년 9월 21일 그의 고향에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 샌드위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Proude nasceu em 1507, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Proude, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Proude, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Rose Serle em 1538, em Waltham, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de setembro de 1545, em sua cidade natal, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Sandwich, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Proude родился в 1507 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Proude было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Proude, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Rose Serle в 1538 г. в местности валтам, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 21 сентября 1545 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности сэндвич, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Proude nació en 1507, en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Proude, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Proude, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Rose Serle en 1538, en Waltham, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 21 de septiembre de 1545, en su pueblo, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Sandwich, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
